name: run_error
description: Agent run that encounters an unrecoverable error partway through

events.query: Compare Tesla and BYD EV battery supply chain strategies

events.thought: Breaking into: (1) Tesla supply chain analysis, (2) BYD supply chain analysis, (3) comparative synthesis.

events.input_summary: company=Tesla, topic=battery supply chain, sources=annual reports, supplier disclosures

events.output_summary: 3 reports found. Tesla sources from Panasonic, CATL, LG Energy.

events.content: Tesla: Vertical integration strategy. Key partners: Panasonic (US), CATL (China), LG Energy (Korea). LFP battery shift noted.

events.input_summary: company=BYD, topic=battery supply chain, sources=annual reports, supplier disclosures

events.output_summary: Connection timeout. BYD data source unavailable.

events.error: Unable to access BYD supply chain data. Source API returned 503.

events.input_summary: company=BYD, topic=battery supply chain, sources=annual reports, supplier disclosures (retry)

events.output_summary: Connection timeout. BYD data source unavailable.

events.content: Tesla: Vertical integration with key partners Panasonic, CATL, LG Energy. In-house 4680 cell production ramping. LFP battery adoption for standard range vehicles.

events.error: Max retries exceeded. BYD data source consistently unavailable.

events.message: Coordinator encountered an unrecoverable error. Cannot proceed with synthesis: missing BYD data. Partial results available for Tesla.
